valid_dnp_title._timezone_warning: This is local midnight 2026-06-12 00:00 in UTC+3. Use local date components for math, NOT toISOString slicing.

non_date_title._note: Result for a page title that is not a date

jan_1_title._note: January 1st — ordinal '1st'. ISO shows local midnight rendered in UTC.
